# Chronic kidney disease

::: {.callout-note}
## Chapter in preparation
This Part IV chapter is planned but not yet drafted. It will cover nutrition in chronic kidney disease — protein, sodium, potassium and phosphate at a recognition level, the dietitian-led renal diet, and when to refer.

Earlier chapters point here for the clinical detail they defer — for now they handle it at
**recognise-and-refer** altitude, and the full management lands in this chapter.
:::
